'''鈭歡-t-sh-g''' ('''kagatshegoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chauffeur|chauffeur]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-t-sh-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chauffeur|chauffeur]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-t-sh-g
|-
! Lemma
| kagatshegoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigatshegoko|thigatshegoko]] || [[word:jigatshegoko|jigatshegoko]] || [[word:shigatshegoko|shigatshegoko]] || [[word:kigatshegoko|kigatshegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugatshegoko|thuthugatshegoko]] || [[word:jujugatshegoko|jujugatshegoko]] || [[word:shushugatshegoko|shushugatshegoko]] || [[word:kukugatshegoko|kukugatshegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugatshegoko|thugatshegoko]] || [[word:jugatshegoko|jugatshegoko]] || [[word:shugatshegoko|shugatshegoko]] || [[word:kugatshegoko|kugatshegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugatshegoko|thugatshegoko]] || [[word:jugatshegoko|jugatshegoko]] || [[word:shugatshegoko|shugatshegoko]] || [[word:kugatshegoko|kugatshegoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegatshegoko|thegatshegoko]] || [[word:jegatshegoko|jegatshegoko]] || [[word:shegatshegoko|shegatshegoko]] || [[word:kegatshegoko|kegatshegoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogatshegoko|thothogatshegoko]] || [[word:jojogatshegoko|jojogatshegoko]] || [[word:shoshogatshegoko|shoshogatshegoko]] || [[word:kokogatshegoko|kokogatshegoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogatshegoko|thogatshegoko]] || [[word:jogatshegoko|jogatshegoko]] || [[word:shogatshegoko|shogatshegoko]] || [[word:kogatshegoko|kogatshegoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogatshegoko|thogatshegoko]] || [[word:jogatshegoko|jogatshegoko]] || [[word:shogatshegoko|shogatshegoko]] || [[word:kogatshegoko|kogatshegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙gatshegoko|th忙gatshegoko]] || [[word:j忙gatshegoko|j忙gatshegoko]] || [[word:sh忙gatshegoko|sh忙gatshegoko]] || [[word:k忙gatshegoko|k忙gatshegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagatshegoko|thathagatshegoko]] || [[word:jajagatshegoko|jajagatshegoko]] || [[word:shashagatshegoko|shashagatshegoko]] || [[word:kakagatshegoko|kakagatshegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagatshegoko|thagatshegoko]] || [[word:jagatshegoko|jagatshegoko]] || [[word:shagatshegoko|shagatshegoko]] || [[word:kagatshegoko|kagatshegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagatshegoko|thagatshegoko]] || [[word:jagatshegoko|jagatshegoko]] || [[word:shagatshegoko|shagatshegoko]] || [[word:kagatshegoko|kagatshegoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shagatshegithi|shagatshegithi]] || [[word:shagatshegiji|shagatshegiji]] || [[word:shagatshegishi|shagatshegishi]] || [[word:shagatshegiki|shagatshegiki]]
